title: 【突發】【重要】 元朗宣言上線啦

replies.msg:
【元朗宣言】





正文:

2019年7月21日，香港發生了開埠以來第一次由政府策劃的恐襲。

數百名白衣人於晚上闖入元朗西鐵站，肆意襲擊站內手無寸鐵的元朗居民和香港市民，當中包括老弱婦孺和孕婦；甚至手持藤鞭硬闖地鐵車廂，向車廂內的無辜乘客不停施襲，現場尤如人間煉獄，慘不忍睹。

尤更甚者，香港警方在整件恐襲事件中竟然不知所蹤，任由無辜市民被身穿白衣的恐怖分子圍毆、虐打、羞辱。更有警員在元朗站內目睹恐襲事件後，不但沒有拯救市民於水火之中，反而轉身往站外方向離開。最後，警員在恐怖分子離開的瞬間姍姍來遲，並且整晚都沒有拘捕任何涉案人士。

至此，香港警察已失信於廣大市民，自甘墮落成為一群毫無公信力可言的烏合之眾；其執法的合法性已經蕩然無存，人人恥與為伍。

悲憤之中，吾等草芥唯有挺身而出，盡一己之力，『自己香港自己救』。

我們要求：
1. 警方公開為721縱容暴徒，罔顧市民安危的的卑劣行為道歉；
2. 盧偉聰與鄧炳強作為警隊之首，責無旁貸，必須引咎辭職；
3. 政府成立獨立調查委員會，查明警方在721元朗恐襲中的失職行為，並予以追究；
4. 警方立案調查何君堯先生在721元朗恐襲中的角色和責任，並且承諾會追究到底。

吾等呼籲一眾熱愛香港的義士同道，齊於7月27日昂首步入元朗，嚴正聲討禍港殃民的『警黑聯盟』，救我城於敗亡之中。

黑衣為記，天佑我城。

English Version

On 21st July, 2019, Hong Kong suffered from her first terrorist attack schemed by the government.

Several hundred personnel armed with canes, iron pipes and a variety of other weapons assaulted weaponless and defenseless Yuen Long residents and ordinary citizens including the elderly, children and even a pregnant woman. The armed personnel trespassed their way into MTR carriages and continued attacking innocent passengers. The hellish scenario was hard for anyone with a conscience to witness.

Furthermore, the Hong Kong Police Force went into hiding and kept silent while all hell broke loose, allowing terrorists dressed in white t-shirts to wallop, torture and humiliate passerby freely. Police officers were spotted on sight during the attack where they deserted their position by exiting the station, instead of protecting citizens as in accord with their sworn oath. Nobody was arrested throughout the night even after the heavily delayed arrival of the police.

HongKongers have already lost their trust in the Hong Kong Police Force. They have degraded into a band of notorious ruffians with no deserving reputation to uphold the law. It is a shame for us to have them as the officers of the law.

In the midst of our collective angst and sorrow, the sole option for us is to fend for ourselves despite our reluctance, as "HongKongers shall save Hong Kong".

Our demands:
1. A public apology from the HKPF for their blatant act of conniving the assault and disregarding the physical well-being of Hong Kong citizens;

2. As the leaders of the HKPF, Mr. Stephan Lo Wai Chung and Mr. Chris Tang Ping-Keung must bear the biggest responsibilities and resign;

3. An independent investigation committee must be found by the government, to conduct a thorough investigation of wrongdoing by the HKPF, with the Force being held accountable for their decisions and bearing the entirety of the consequences;

4. The HKPF must inquest the alleged corroboration between Mr. Junius Kwan-Yiu Ho and the organizations behind the 721 Yuen Long Terrorist Assault, with him being held accountable for his decisions and bearing the entirety of the consequences.

We implore our fellow patriots of Hong Kong to march on into Yuen Long (27th July ) and deliver our solemn condemnation to the "Evil Axis of Police and Triad", to rescue our city from the current plight.

Black be our Creed, Blessed be our City.
